ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the authority */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the authority belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of authority (e.g., local, national) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the authority */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the authority */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the authority */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the authority was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the authority was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorities_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorities_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the authority holding the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., national, local) */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated in the election */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the election was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the election was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES authorities ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_data" (
  "voting_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting data entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the data belongs to */,
  "yes_votes" INTEGER /* Number of yes votes */,
  "yes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of yes votes */,
  "no_votes" INTEGER /* Number of no votes */,
  "no_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of no votes */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the voting data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the voting data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the candidate is participating in */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party the candidate belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the candidate */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the candidate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the candidate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, election official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "voting_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_voting_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_data_id") REFERENCES voting_data ("voting_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the party was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the party was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "voting_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting data the vote belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the vote was cast for */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter who cast the vote (if identifiable and permitted by regulations) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voting_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_data_id") REFERENCES voting_data ("voting_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates_authorities" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the authority */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "authority_id")
)
